content: Police records still list the victim as suffering an "incapacitating injury" but news stories report that he died.
Streetsblog says the police report describes the driver as "DISTRACTED", but this is not currently in the data, suggesting that the data has since been revised.
City records still list the 83-year-old victim as suffering non-incapacitating injuries, but news reports say he died of his injuries.
City data still lists victim as severly injured but news reports say she died 2 weeks after her injuries.
